_comment: Speedrun starter hooks for the anki fork. Rename to settings.json at Phase 0 AFTER the build env works (these commands require ./ninja + cargo). Validate against current Claude Code hooks schema (code.claude.com/docs/en/hooks). Guard against formatter re-entry and Stop-loop (check stop_hook_active).

_hook_scripts_to_create_at_phase0.tools/speedrun_format.py: reads tool_input.file_path from stdin JSON; runs ./ninja format (or cargo fmt / ruff / prettier) on .rs/.py/.svelte/.ts; emits lint errors back as additionalContext, not just a block
_hook_scripts_to_create_at_phase0.tools/speedrun_guard.py: PreToolUse denials: rm -rf; raw SQL writes outside storage/; .proto field-number edits; edits to *_test.rs/tests/ paths and eval/holdout/ (anti-gaming) unless human flag set
_hook_scripts_to_create_at_phase0.tools/speedrun_stopgate.py: runs ./ninja check for the touched stack; returns {"decision":"block","reason":"..."} on failure; checks stop_hook_active to avoid infinite loop
